name: optimistic-toggle
description: A like / favourite toggle that flips the instant you press it and rolls back if the server refuses — the single-value showcase of the optimistic pattern behind use-optimistic-list.

notes: A real toggle button with aria-pressed, so the state is announced
aria-busy is set while the commit is in flight
A polite live region announces a rollback when the commit fails
The heart icon is decorative (aria-hidden); the action is named via aria-label

intents: a like or favourite button that updates instantly and rolls back on error
an optimistic toggle backed by a server commit
a pressed toggle button with optimistic UI
